ad_name: Asiakastarina: Tuntuvat paremmilta kuin 500€ lasit — Naiset 45-54

structure.note: Short punchy customer testimonial. Talking head as main, B-roll cuts match each sentence. Every B-roll shows the actual Banaani product from reference images. Uses Kling O3 dual-frame for smooth transitions.

avatar_prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a Finnish/Nordic woman, age 50, natural light blonde shoulder-length hair typical Scandinavian style, wearing a soft cream-white knit sweater. Warm genuine smile showing slight surprise, kind light blue Nordic eyes, fair skin with natural freckles. Soft natural daylight from a kitchen window in a cozy Finnish home. Shallow depth of field, creamy warm bokeh. Shot on professional camera, detailed skin texture, minimal natural makeup. Upper body framing, looking directly at camera. 9:16 vertical portrait orientation. High-end lifestyle photography.

talking_head.full_script: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista. Sit mä löysin Banaanin. Kahdet lasit, yheksällä kympillä. Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit. Ja näiden Hinta-laatusuhde on loistava. Kokeile itekin, banaanieyewear.fi.

script_breakdown.line: Mä maksoin ennen yli viissataa euroa laseista.
Nää tuntuu paremmilta ku ne ylihinnotellut viidensadan euron lasit.

talking_head.note: 20s tight testimonial. Each line gets its own B-roll cut. Real customer quotes woven into natural speech.

broll_clips.motion_prompt: Slow camera zoom in towards the expensive glasses, light reflecting off the clinical glass surfaces, cold sterile atmosphere
